name: Item Level
desc: Average of the 6 equipped items. Drives HP, output, and healing.

name: Output
desc: Per-tick damage (or healing) rate, scaled from item level by role.

name: Health
desc: A character dies when this reaches 0. Scaled from item level by role.

name: Mana
desc: Healer resource. Long pulls genuinely OOM the healer.

name: Morale
desc: 0-100 mental state. Feeds the output band and the departure roll.

name: Crit
desc: Raises crit chance in the Hit Quality system.

name: Versatility
desc: Raises avoid chance and reduces damage taken.
